name: P2KB MCP Development
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y liblept5 libtesseract5 || true; sudo mkdir -p /Users/stephen && sudo ln -sfn /opt/container-tools /Users/stephen/container-tools; go mod download && go install golang.org/x/tools/gopls@latest && go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest; cd /tmp && unzip -o /workspaces/P2-Knowledge-Base-MCP/.devcontainer/pnut-ts-linux-arm64-015500.zip && sudo cp /tmp/pnut-ts-linux-arm64-015500/pnut_ts/pnut-ts /usr/local/bin/pnut-ts && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/pnut-ts && rm -rf /tmp/pnut-ts-linux-arm64-015500 || true; [ -f .devcontainer/local-setup.sh ] && bash .devcontainer/local-setup.sh || true; curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash || true; grep -q '$HOME/.local/bin' ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null || echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; claude --update || true;
